basicInfo.name: Sizar
basicInfo.flavor: After making a name for himself in the war over the Power of Destruction, Sizar rises in power in the Terra Kingdom. Due to the grotesque, inhuman appearance of his hand and his cold, calculating personality, he comes to be known as the \"Hand of Depravity.\

profile.story: After making a name for himself in the war over the Power of Destruction, Sizar rises in power in the Terra Kingdom. Due to the grotesque, inhuman appearance of his hand and his cold, calculating personality, he comes to be known as the \"Hand of Depravity.\
